name: core--ignore-generated-artifacts
description: Ignore generated Home Assistant energy table artifacts from git tracking

changes: Add pattern for generated energy tables: tools/home-assistant-live/*_energy_table*.md
These files are generated by sync_room_energy_tables.js via launchd daily refresh
Should not be tracked; regenerate with: source protected/main.sh prod home-assistant && node tools/home-assistant-live/sync_room_energy_tables.js

checks: Source control status clean (no modified tracking of .md files in home-assistant-live)
